def test_bitcount_xor_bug():
    from source import bitcount
    # Input with multiple 1-bits in binary representation
    n = 127  # binary: 1111111
    assert bitcount(n) == 7, f"Expected 7 1-bits in {n}, but got {bitcount(n)}"

def test_bitcount_fixed():
    from source import bitcount
    # Input with multiple 1-bits in binary representation
    n = 127  # binary: 1111111
    assert bitcount(n) == 7, "Fixed code should correctly count 7 1-bits in 127"
